title: AI Assistant for Real Estate Agents
metaTitle: AI Assistant for Real Estate Agents - Close More Deals with AI
metaDescription: GAIA helps real estate agents manage leads, automate follow-ups, schedule showings, and keep clients informed with proactive AI-powered communication management.
keywords: AI assistant for real estate agents
AI for real estate lead follow-up
best AI for real estate agents
AI for client communication in real estate
real estate agent lead response AI
intro: Real estate is a relationship-driven business where response time directly impacts conversion rates. NAR research shows that agents who respond to leads within 5 minutes are 21x more likely to convert them compared to 30-minute response times. Yet most agents manage 20+ active clients while prospecting for new business, making instant response nearly impossible without automation. GAIA ensures every lead gets a prompt response and every client stays informed throughout their transaction.
painPoints: Lead response time suffers when juggling showings, closings, and client calls simultaneously
Client communication across email, text, and phone creates scattered conversation histories
Showing scheduling and coordination with listing agents consumes hours of back-and-forth
Market updates and neighborhood information need to be shared proactively with active buyers

howGaiaHelps.title: Instant Lead Response
howGaiaHelps.description: GAIA monitors Gmail for new lead inquiries and drafts personalized initial responses within minutes. It categorizes leads by intent and urgency, ensuring hot leads receive immediate attention.

howGaiaHelps.title: Client Communication Tracking
howGaiaHelps.description: GAIA organizes all client communications from Gmail and Slack into per-client timelines, tracks last contact dates, and prompts you to reach out when clients have gone quiet.

howGaiaHelps.title: Showing & Meeting Coordination
howGaiaHelps.description: GAIA manages your Google Calendar for showings, coordinates scheduling with listing agents via email, sends confirmation and reminder messages, and prepares property briefings using Google Maps and Yelp neighborhood data.

faqs.question: How does GAIA help real estate agents respond to leads faster?
faqs.answer: GAIA monitors your email inbox 24/7 for new lead inquiries and drafts personalized responses immediately. While you are at a showing, GAIA ensures every new lead receives a professional, timely response that keeps them engaged until you can follow up personally.

faqs.question: Can GAIA help with property research?
faqs.answer: Yes. GAIA integrates with Google Maps and Yelp to compile neighborhood information, nearby amenities, and area insights. It can prepare property briefings and area comparisons to share with buyers.

faqs.question: Does GAIA integrate with real estate CRMs?
faqs.answer: GAIA integrates with HubSpot for CRM management and can track client relationships through Gmail. Custom MCP integrations can connect GAIA to specialized real estate platforms.
